title: Hong Kong Watch：加拿大國會議員要求香港官員及警察制裁名單，如可以請同時提供證據

replies.msg:
Send電郵去 info@hongkongwatch.org

Sanction List under Sergei Magnitsky Act

Canadian Parliamentarians are asking for the sanction list of officials and chief of police. Please provide the list with evidence if possible. Email info@hongkongwatch.org

The 3rd briefing on Hong Kong at the Canadian Parliament was a great success. Over 60 Parliamentarians and staff had attended. Some Parliamentarians will put forward motions for sanction.
